title: Homologation of partition
doc_html:
Art. 4609.  Homologation of partition

When the partition has been completed by the notary, he shall file his proces verbal of the partition, or a copy thereof, in the court which ordered the partition.  Any party may rule all other parties into court to show cause why the partition should not be homologated or rejected.
doc_text:
